calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emanuel Braden in Propria Persona. Jeanah Braden in Propria Persona.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the sale price of the boat and the Administrator's fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 Continued To Jan-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanah Braden (Administrator) in Propria Persona. Emanuel Braden (Heir) in Propira Persona.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the sale price of the boat. The Court will take this issue under submission. The Accounting Petition was continued to January 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice. The issue of fees for document preparation will be addressed at that time as well. If no appearance is made on that date, the matter will be taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order
